phase: v107 canary post-remediation (5 bugs found, 2 fleet-wide blockers fixed)

A.title: Phase I silent degradation — install-gbrain.sh emitted WARN-and-continue when pglite-checkpoint.sh missing, fleet-wide impact
A.root_cause: Reconciler stepGbrain uploaded ONLY install-gbrain.sh + verify-gbrain-mcp.py. The 2 companion files (pglite-checkpoint.sh + 0001-add-checkpoint-mcp-tool.patch) were NEVER uploaded, so Phase C2 and Phase I always fell into their for-candidate-loop fallback and emitted WARN + exit 0.
A.impact: 15/15 active canary VMs lacked: src/core/checkpoint-operation.ts, ExecStop CHECKPOINT hook, 30-min CHECKPOINT cron. pg_control aged 268-815 min stale. Reconciler reported INSTALL_COMPLETE despite half-installed state.
A.fix_summary: Reconciler now uploads all 4 companion files via SSH stdin. install-gbrain.sh Phase C2 hard-fails with exit 36 (FATAL_PHASE_C2_NO_PATCH_FILE) and Phase I hard-fails with exit 35 (FATAL_PHASE_I_NO_CRON_SCRIPT) if companion files missing. Future installs either succeed completely or fail loudly — no silent degradation.
A.status: FIXED + deployed + remediated on 15 active VMs

B.title: vm-watchdog.py SIGKILL'd gbrain every 30 min on 9/26 fleet VMs
B.root_cause: vm-watchdog.py's check_runaway_processes() unconditionally SIGKILL's any process older than PROCESS_MAX_AGE_MIN (30) that's not in protected_pids/protected_comms. gbrain runs as comm=bun, not protected. PID lookup pattern existed for openclaw-gateway but not gbrain.
B.impact: 5 cohort VMs (vm-893/vm-929/vm-935/vm-904/vm-912) + presumably 3 edge VMs (vm-917/vm-922/vm-923) had gbrain restart 12-18 times/8h. Pattern: gbrain runs 30 min → vm-watchdog SIGKILL → systemd Restart=always brings it back in 5s → repeat. The May-1 fleet-wide watchdog-disable was patchy; ~65% of VMs had watchdog commented out, the rest still ran it.
B.fix_summary: Added gbrain.service MainPID lookup to vm-watchdog.py (mirror of gateway_pid pattern). Added to protected_pids set. Defensive: if subprocess timeout / parse error, gbrain_pid stays 0 → falls through to existing behavior (no exception escape).
B.status: FIXED + deployed + file-drift propagating + 8/8 at-risk VMs proactively patched via scripts/_push_vm_watchdog_fix.ts

C.title: vm-602 missing OPENAI_API_KEY in ~/.openclaw/.env
C.root_cause: configureOpenClaw at lib/ssh.ts:6692 writes OPENAI_API_KEY ONCE at VM assignment, gated on if(openaiEnvKey) from process.env. OPENAI_API_KEY is NOT in SECRET_ENV_VAR_SOURCES, so stepEnvVarPush doesn't re-propagate it. If env was unset or configure didn't reach line 6692 at the time vm-602 was provisioned, the key never landed and has no self-healing path.
C.impact: 1 VM (vm-602): gbrain install blocked at Phase A NO_OPENAI_KEY check.
C.fix_summary: One-shot: appended OPENAI_API_KEY=<key> to vm-602's ~/.openclaw/.env via SSH. Verified count=1.
C.p2_followup: Add OPENAI_API_KEY entry to SECRET_ENV_VAR_SOURCES in lib/vm-reconcile.ts so stepEnvVarPush self-heals on every reconcile cycle. Single-line addition; eliminates the configure-time race.
C.status: FIXED (one-shot on vm-602) + P2 structural fix queued

D.title: vm-634 half-installed (Phase E TOKEN_MINT_FAILED, no bun, corrupted gbrain dir)
D.root_cause: Prior install hit Phase E TOKEN_MINT_FAILED, leaving ~/gbrain (340 MB) and ~/.gbrain/brain.pglite (41 MB) on disk but no bearer, no service, no bun runtime. Phase A idempotency check wouldn't fire (no service active), but Phase B's existing-dir detection would skip clone and try to advance the broken state.
D.fix_summary: rm -rf ~/gbrain (per Cooper instruction; preserved ~/.gbrain per Rule 22 even though no real user data — Phase E never minted a bearer). vm-634 already at cv=105 (in candidate pool). Reconciler will now do fresh install with new Bug A+F upload paths.

E.title: vm-517 GATEWAY_UNHEALTHY_POST_HOT_RELOAD heal — transient hot-reload timing issue
E.root_cause: stepGbrain Phase G hot-reload health check timing. After openclaw config set, the reconciler probes gateway /health. On vm-517 this fired before the gateway finished its post-reload state, returning 000. Repeated reconcile attempts hit the same timing → rcf escalated to 10 → quarantined.
E.impact: vm-517 was actually healthy on the VM (gbrain active, /health 200, AGENTS+SOUL markers) but DB stuck at rcf=10 since 09:31:21 UTC, excluded from candidate pool.
E.fix_summary: Cleared reconcile_quarantined_at + reset rcf=0 on vm-517. Remediation gbrain-restart already resolved the underlying state. Next reconcile cycle: stepGbrain idempotent skip (V/T/S/P all current) → cv bumps to 108.
E.p2_followup: stepGbrain Phase G should retry the /health probe with a brief backoff (3 attempts × 3s) before failing. The hot-reload timing is non-deterministic in OpenClaw 2026.4.26.
E.status: FIXED (quarantine cleared) + P2 retry-logic followup queued
